mapper.sql: id, name, path, component, icon, parent_id, sort, type, permission, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from sys_menu where status = #{status} order by sort nulls last, id
select from sys_menu order by sort nulls last, id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu (name, path, component, icon, parent_id, sort, type, permission, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{name}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{parentId}, #{sort}, #{type}, #{permission}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_menu set name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort = #{sort}, type = #{type}, permission = #{permission}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
